languages.text: "Караул Смерти — орден, созданный для истребления ксеносов. Это все, что я могу рассказать, не нарушая своих клятв". {n}Капитан многозначительно умолкает.{/n}
"The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Караул Смерти — орден, созданный для истребления ксеносов. Это все, что я могу рассказать, не нарушая своих клятв". {n}Капитан многозначительно умолкает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}
"The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

"The Deathwatch is an order created for the purpose of exterminating xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows and the edicts of the Ordo Xenos." {n}The Space Marine lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}
"The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}
"The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

languages.text: 「死の監視は異種族を駆逐することを目的とした秩序である。それが私の誓約と異種族秩序の命令に反することなく伝えられる限りのことだ」{n}スペースマリーンは鋭い沈黙に陥る.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Deathwatch is an order created for the purpose of exterminating xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows and the edicts of the Ordo Xenos." {n}The Space Marine lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「死の監視は異種族を駆逐することを目的とした秩序である。それが私の誓約と異種族秩序の命令に反することなく伝えられる限りのことだ。」{n}スペースマリーンは鋭い沈黙に陥る.{/n}

languages.text: «Los Vigías de la Muerte somos un capítulo dedicado al exterminio de xenos. Es todo lo que puedo decir sin quebrantar mis juramentos». {n}Guarda un silencio lleno de significado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Los Vigías de la Muerte somos un capítulo dedicado al exterminio de xenos. Es todo lo que puedo decir sin quebrantar mis juramentos». {n}Guarda un silencio lleno de significado.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Deathwatch ist ein Kapitel, das sich der Vernichtung der Xenos verschrieben hat. Mehr kann ich Euch nicht sagen, ohne gegen meine Eide zu verstoßen." {n}Er schweigt eine Weile.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Deathwatch ist ein Kapitel, das sich der Vernichtung der Xenos verschrieben hat. Mehr kann ich Euch nicht sagen, ohne gegen meine Eide zu verstoßen." {n}Er schweigt eine Weile.{/n}

languages.text: « La Deathwatch est un chapitre consacré à l'extermination des xénos. Je ne peux pas vous en dire plus sans renier mes vœux. » {n}Il s'enferme dans un silence éloquent.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

languages.text: “死亡守望是一个致力于剿灭异形的战团。我只能说这么多，再讲便是违背誓言。”{n}他当即闭口不言。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Deathwatch is a Chapter dedicated to the extermination of xenos. That is all I can tell you without violating my vows." {n}He lapses into a pointed silence.{/n}

languages.text: "Ölümnöbeti, zenoları yok etmek amacıyla kurulmuş bir Tümen'dir. Yeminlerimi çiğnemeden sana söyleyebileceklerim bu kadar." {n}Manidar bir sessizliğe gömülüyor.{/n}
